name: Mackinac Island Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
2. Beat combined yolks, milk, and salt until thick and lemon colored.
3. Fold the yolks into the egg whites.
4. Melt butter in a 10-inch ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the egg mixture to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes or until the underside is golden brown.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven.
8. Make a deep crease across the center of the top.
9. Place process cheese spread on half of the omelet and continue baking until it begins to melt.
10. Slip a spatula underneath, tip the skillet to loosen, and gently fold in half.
11. Combine preserves and toasted almonds; heat thoroughly, stirring occasionally.
12. Serve over the omelet. Makes 4 servings.
